---
title: "Liens utiles"
subtitle: "Documentation, bibliothèques et tutoriels Julia"
toc: false
---

## [Documentation]{.casc-section-title}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi book-fill >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Documentation Julia](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Documentation officielle complète du langage.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi stopwatch-fill >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Learn X in Y minutes](https://learnxinyminutes.com/docs/julia){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Cheat-sheet rapide pour Julia.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi mortarboard-fill >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Tutoriels d'introduction](https://github.com/xorJane/Introduction_to_Julia_tutorials){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Notebooks d'introduction (cf. vidéo plus bas).
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi diagram-3-fill >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [MoJuWo](https://modernjuliaworkflows.org/){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Modern Julia Workflows — bonnes pratiques.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi speedometer2 >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Julia performance](https://gdalle.github.io/JuliaPerf-CERMICS/){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Optimisation et benchmarking en Julia.
:::
:::

:::

## [Bibliothèques]{.casc-section-title}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi graph-up >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Plots.jl](https://github.com/JuliaPlots/Plots.jl){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Visualisation polyvalente.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi calculator-fill >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Polynomials.jl](https://github.com/JuliaMath/Polynomials.jl){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Manipulation de polynômes.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi soundwave >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Interpolations.jl](https://github.com/JuliaMath/Interpolations.jl){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Interpolation multidimensionnelle.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi graph-up-arrow >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [ForwardDiff.jl](https://github.com/JuliaDiff/ForwardDiff.jl){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Différentiation automatique en mode direct.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.casc-card}
[{{< bi graph-down-arrow >}}]{.casc-card-icon}

### [Zygote.jl](https://github.com/FluxML/Zygote.jl){.casc-card-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

Différentiation automatique en mode inverse.
:::
:::

:::

## [Vidéos]{.casc-section-title}

### Intro to Julia tutorial

[{{< bi code-slash >}} Notebooks associés](https://github.com/xorJane/Introduction_to_Julia_tutorials){.casc-action-btn .ghost target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/8h8rQyEpiZA >}}

### The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Multiple Dispatch

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/kc9HwsxE1OY >}}

### Automatic Differentiation in 10 minutes

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/vAp6nUMrKYg >}}
